traditionalDress.title: Traditional Mising Attire
traditionalDress.description: A group of Mising women photographed in the Jia Bharali region, documenting the community's traditional attire. The ensemble features the **Égé** as the primary lower garment, layered with the black **Tongali** (waist wrap). The attire is traditionally paired with the **Gebu**, a yellow handloom cloth distinctive to the Mising people of this area.
